//: Vault .claude/settings.json TEMPLATE. /setup copies this to <vault>/.claude/settings.json. Enabling the plugin loads its skills + hooks (SessionStart, PostToolUse) scoped to this vault only. enabledPlugins is an object map of "plugin@marketplace": true. Add loadout plugins (e.g. wfk-notes, wfk-build) as additional true entries as the user installs them.
